zh.lifeSummary: 當Dafydd Wr ap Gruffudd於大約1270年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根阿拉沃時，他的父親Gruffudd ap Trahaearn30歲，母親Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearn26歲。他和Lleucu verch Elidir至少有5個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dafydd Wr ap Gruffudd于大约1270年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根阿拉沃时，他的父亲Gruffudd ap Trahaearn30岁，母亲Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearn26岁。他和Lleucu verch Elidir至少有5个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Griffith
meanings: Welsh (Carmarthenshire and western England): from the Old Welsh personal name Gruffudd, Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, composed of the elements grip, of uncertain significance, + iud ‘chief, lord’.

nameMeanings.name: Dafydd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of David . In widespread use during the Middle Ages, it was later largely replaced by the English form, but since the late 19th century it has come into its own again.

nameMeanings.name: Wr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Dafydd Wr ap Gruffudd was born about 1270, in Aberavon, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, Gruffudd ap Trahaearn, was 30 and his mother, Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearn, was 26. He had at least 5 sons with Lleucu verch Elidir.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dafydd Wr ap Gruffudd est né environ 1270, à Aberavon, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Gruffudd ap Trahaearn, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearn, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Lleucu verch Elidir.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dafydd Wr ap Gruffudd um 1270 in Aberavon, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd ap Trahaearn 30 und seine Mutter Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearn 26. Er hatte mit Lleucu verch Elidir mindestens 5 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dafydd Wr ap Gruffudd è nato il circa 1270 nel Aberavon, Glamorgan, Galles, il suo padre, Gruffudd ap Trahaearn, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearn, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Lleucu verch Elidir.

ja.lifeSummary: Dafydd Wr ap Gruffuddが約1270年にウェールズグラモーガンアバーアボンで生まれた時，父Gruffudd ap Trahaearnは30歳，母Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearnは26歳であった。彼はLleucu verch Elidirとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Dafydd Wr ap Gruffudd(이)가 대략 1270년 웨일스 글램르건 압라폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd ap Trahaearn(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearn(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Lleucu verch Elidir(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dafydd Wr ap Gruffudd родился около 1270 г. в местности абиравон, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gruffudd ap Trahaearn было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearn, 26. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Lleucu verch Elidir.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dafydd Wr ap Gruffudd nació aproximadamente 1270, en Aberavon, Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Gruffudd ap Trahaearn, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Mrs Gruffudd ap Trahaearn, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Lleucu verch Elidir.
